label: Markets
description: Filterable prediction market grid with category, venue, sort, and search via FilterBar.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file — all data via usePredictionsData().

0.6.note: isLoading guard present (stub, ready for wiring).

0.7.note: Empty state: Card with Search icon and 'No markets found' when filteredMarkets.length === 0.

0.8.note: Error guard present (stub, ready for wiring).

1.1.note: Reads filteredMarkets, filterDefs/values, handlers exclusively via usePredictionsData().

1.3.note: Market catalogue is global — org scope filtering applies to positions, not market listings.

1.4.note: clientIds gap acknowledged — same open gap as other domains.

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A for market catalogue display.

1.6.note: Empty scope returns full market catalogue.

1.7.note: CATEGORY_OPTIONS/SORT_OPTIONS defined in context file — correct location.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain,tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: Applies: live ✓, paper ✓ (markets are global catalogue, always shown), batch ✓ (read-only catalogue still valid).

3.2.note: context reads useExecutionMode(); isPaper/isBatch available; market catalogue display is mode-agnostic by design.

3.5.note: Paper mode: market catalogue displayed identically; no order entry in this widget.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or setInterval in this widget; filter state is pure React state.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. 3.3/3.4 require human browser check — no order/trade submission buttons in this widget so batch disable check is N/A. Human verify: widget renders correctly in batch mode.

4.1.note: No dead buttons — no onClick=()=>{} or console.log-only handlers found.

4.5.note: No gated route links in this widget.

4.6.note: No per-render entitlement checks; entitlements are gated at page level via PageEntitlementGate.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify filters update grid correctly (4.3), market cards are clickable and drive MarketDetail widget (4.4), grid scrolls within widget bounds (4.8).

5.1.note: Serves strategies: PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M, PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H. Widget is the market discovery entry-point for all prediction strategies.

l5.notes: Agent prep (5.1) complete. Human: walk 5.2-5.6 — confirm market cards populate for all prediction venues (polymarket, kalshi), search/filter narrows correctly, clicking a market routes to MarketDetail.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl colors. text-rose-400 replaced with text-destructive.

7.2.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

7.3.note: 75 lines — well within 500-line limit. No function >200 lines.

7.4.note: PredMarketsGridWidget PascalCase; file kebab-case; hooks useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function, or innerHTML=

7.7.note: No inline object/array literals in useEffect/useMemo deps.

l7.notes: All L7 checks pass. text-rose-400 error states replaced with text-destructive.

8.1.note: No text-[...] arbitrary font sizes in widget file.

8.2.note: No p/m-[...] arbitrary spacing in widget file.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent from components/ui/card; FilterBar shared primitive.

8.4.note: Agent: no without alt, no bare , no interactive divs without role. Human: keyboard + screen-reader walk required.

l8.notes: Agent checks (8.1-8.3) pass. Human: 8.4 keyboard walk + 8.5 resize at minW=4.

keepSeparate.rationale: Grid and detail are deliberately split to allow flexible layout; grid drives MarketDetail via shared selectedMarketId state in context.

relationships.notes: setSelectedMarketId drives pred-market-detail; also feeds pred-trade-panel via setQuickTradeMarketId indirectly.

dataContract.notes: Currently mocked. Production: REST poll or WebSocket push from prediction market data service (Polymarket/Kalshi aggregator).

gaps: No venue other than polymarket/kalshi supported
Real-time price updates not yet wired
coverage.notes: Widget serves as entry-point to all prediction market strategies.

findings.description: pred-markets-grid-widget.tsx — No loading or error guard. Added isLoading/error stubs following DeFi context pattern.
findings.fix: Added isLoading/error guard stubs consistent with DeFi widget pattern.

findings.description: pred-markets-grid-widget.tsx:37 — text-rose-400 hardcoded color in error state
findings.fix: Replaced text-rose-400 with text-destructive (CSS var token).
Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
